title: Dri pak 1kg, alternatively 2 kg
features: Cleans and freshens around the home
Deodoriser for the refrigerator, carpets, upholstery, vinyl, bins, drains
Safe to use in septic tanks
description:
Product Description Description: A gentle, deodorising, multi-action cleaner.

'Clean and Natural' Bicarbonate of Soda is a traditional cleaning product, renowned for its deodorising and mild abrasive properties. 

Bicarbonate of Soda can be used for the following household tasks:

It can be used as a mild abrasive or scouring agent on shiny materials, as it cleans without scratching. It is suitable for use on aluminium, chrome, jewellery, plastic, porcelain, silver, stainless steel and tin.
Bicarbonate of Soda is an excellent deodoriser for the refrigerator, carpets, upholstery, vinyl, bins, drains.
It is a mild alkali so is effective for neutralising bee stings (Note- Wasp stings are alkaline and therefore should be treated with white vinegar and NOT Bicarbonate of Soda)
6 x 500g

Usage Instructions:

Cleaning:

Use this powder as a mild abrasive to clean cooker tops, sinks and tiles. Sprinkle directly onto the surface and wipe over with a damp sponge or cloth. For extra cleaning power, mix with Dri-Pack Borax Substitute and Cooking Salt in equal quantities and add a small amount of water to make a cleaning paste. Apply to the surface and wipe off.

Deodorising:

To deodorise carpets and upholstery, sprinkle Biocarbonate of Soda and leave for at least an hour, or preferably overnight. Then vacuum to leave fresh smelling perfume free fabric. Test for colourfastness before use.

To deodorise fridges, simply remove the top of the packet and place at the back of the fridge When odour starts to return, replace the packet. Empty the spent packets into plug holes or drains followed by hot water to help keep them clean.

Add Bicarbonate of Soda to waste bins, dustbins and pet litter trays to reduce odour.

Sinks:

Pour two or three tblespoons of Bicarbonate of Soda followed by an equal amount of White Vinegar down plug holes to keep sinks an baths clean and odour free. The fizzing action will help to remove built up debris. Flush with hot water after ten minutes Ingredients Sodium Bicarbonate.
